sections.sectionTitle: Kote-a' ding Thu Hong Ngetsak Un

verses.text: Sanggamte aw, tu-in note lak mah bangin mun dangah zong Topa' thu manlang takin kizel pakin lungdam takin a kisan' theihna dingin kote-a' ding thu hong ngetsak un
Mi khempeuh in thu um nailo uh ahih manin a gilo a siahuai mite panin Pasian in kote hong hotkhiatna dingin zong hong ngetsak un
Note ahih leh, Topa citak mahmah ahih manin hong thahatsak ding a, A Gilopa kiang panin hong honkhia ding hi
Note kiangah ka hong gen uh thute a kipat cila kipanin na zuih uh mah bangin zui paisuak taktak ding, ci-in note muan'na lungsim kote sungah Topa in hong guan hi
Pasian bangin itna nei-in Khrih thuak bangin na thuakzawhna dingun Topa in note lungsim hong bawlsak ta hen.
Sanggamte aw, i Topa Jesuh Khrih min tawh kong sawlnop uh thu panin: Note tungah ka hong hilhsa uh thute a zuilo, a thadah gamtat thu uppih mite tawh na kikhawl kei un
Kote' gamtatzia bangin a gamta ding na hihna uh teltakin na thei uh hi. Note tawh ka hong omkhawm lai-un ka thadah om kei uh hi
Kuama an a khongin ka ne kei uh hi. Note khat peuhpeuh in nong suplawhkhak lohna dingun a sun a zanin hahkat takin na ka sem uh hi
Hih bangin ka gamtatna uh pen note' hong piakte a khongin ne-in a zang dingin a kilawm mah hinapi-in, note' etteh ding gamtatzia a hong lak ka hizaw uh hi
Note tawh ka hong omkhawm lai-un, “Na a sem nuamlo mi peuhmah an nesak kei un,” ci-in ka hong gen uh hi
Hih bangin thu ka hong genna uh pen note lakah mi pawlkhatte thadahin na sem nuamlo uh a, midangte' nasepna va nawngkaisak zawsop hi, ci-in ka zakna hang uh ahi hi
Tu-in tua bang mite in kuamah nawngkaisak nawnloin man manin na sem hiathiatin amau' nuntakna dingun na a sepna dingun Topa Jesuh Khrih min tawh hanthawnin thu ka hong pia uh hi
Sanggamte aw, note in a hoihin gamtat ding na cimtak ngei het kei ta un
Hih lai sunga ka hong gente uh a zui nuamlo mi khatpeuh a om leh tua mipa limtakin ciamteh un la, amah a maizum theihna dingin kikholhpih nawn kei un
Ahi zongin amah galbawl kei un la, thu uppih mi khat hihna tawh hilhbawl zaw un.
Eite tungah nopsakna a hong pia thei Topa in note tungah a tawntungin nopsakna hong pia hen la, amah in note khempeuh hong ompih ta hen
Keimah Paul in kong hopih hi, cihna kammal teng keima khut tawh ka hong gelh ahi hi. Keima laikhak khempeuh hih bangzia-in ciamtehin ka hih ngeina ahi hi
I Topa Jesuh Khrih hong hehpihna thupha note khempeuh tungah hong tung ta hen.
